title: Valletta, Valletta District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Valletta, Valletta District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Valletta is a city in Valletta District with a population of 5,700. Europe’s smallest capital, a UNESCO World Heritage city built by the Knights of St. John, with stunning Baroque architecture, fortified walls, and a grand harbor.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
